content.headline: The Power of Reading
content.body: Reading expands your knowledge, improves focus, and reduces stress. This program will help you build a reading habit that enriches your life.

content.headline: Building the Habit
content.body: Start small - read for just 15-20 minutes a day. Choose books that genuinely interest you. Keep a reading journal to track your progress and thoughts.

content.mantra: Every page turns a new chapter in your life
